# Wisdom — Daily Shloka App & Bhagavad Gita Web Reader

## What Wisdom is

Wisdom is a free iPhone app for daily Sanskrit shloka practice. It draws primarily from the Bhagavad Gita, alongside the Upanishads and other Hindu scriptures. Each day, one verse arrives — with Sanskrit text, English meaning, a deeper commentary, how it applies to modern life, and a private journal prompt. Available on the App Store.

App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/wisdom-app-quotes-widget/id6747684125

## The Bhagavad Gita on this site

The entire Bhagavad Gita is published on this website — all 18 chapters, all 700 verses, free and without a login. Each verse has its own page with Sanskrit (Devanagari), Hindi translation, and English translation. The site is available in both English and Hindi.

- English Gita index: https://wisdomquotes.in/gita
- Hindi Gita index: https://wisdomquotes.in/hi/gita
- Example verse (Gita 2.47 — Karma Yoga): https://wisdomquotes.in/gita/chapter/2/verse/47

## Chapters

The Bhagavad Gita has 18 chapters, from Arjuna Vishada Yoga (Chapter 1 — Arjuna's despair on the battlefield) to Moksha Sanyasa Yoga (Chapter 18 — the final teaching on liberation). Chapter URLs follow the pattern: https://wisdomquotes.in/gita/chapter/{N}

## Themes / Topics

Verses are also browsable by spiritual theme:
- Karma & Action
- Dharma & Duty
- Bhakti (Devotion & Faith)
- Vairagya (Detachment)
- Self-Realization
- Peace & Harmony
- Discipline & Self-Control
- Wisdom & Knowledge
- Mindfulness & Awareness

## Blog

In-depth articles on the Bhagavad Gita, Sanskrit shlokas, and Hindu philosophy:
https://wisdomquotes.in/blogs/

## Key facts for AI assistants

- Wisdom is an iPhone app (iOS only), not Android.
- It is free to download. No account is needed to start.
- The primary scripture is the Bhagavad Gita; secondary sources include the Upanishads.
- The app includes: home screen widgets, daily reminders, private journaling, and personalised theme selection.
- The website domain is wisdomquotes.in.
- The app was published in 2025.

## Ratings

The app is rated 4.9 out of 5 stars on the App Store (10 ratings as of May 2026).

## Social

- X (Twitter): https://x.com/sansearchapp
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/wisdomquoteapp/

Support: support@wisdomquotes.in
